name: linkedin-engagement-navigator
description: Human-in-the-loop LinkedIn engagement workflow for Codex using the signed-in Chrome session.

interface.shortDescription: Review LinkedIn in Chrome, draft approved comments, and avoid duplicate engagement.
interface.longDescription: Human-in-the-loop LinkedIn engagement assistant for Codex that reviews visible posts in your signed-in Chrome session, drafts grounded comments, and waits for explicit approval before any final action.
defaultPrompt: Review my LinkedIn feed and draft comments for AI engineering posts. Do not submit anything.
Open this LinkedIn post and draft one grounded comment. Wait for my approval before any final click.
